---
title: "Assessment for Week 0"
---


- [ ] [Let Us Know of Your GitHub Username ](https://www.gradescope.com/courses/1287917/assignments/7902669) Read the instructions in the provided link.

- [ ] [Introduce Yourself to the Teaching Team](https://www.gradescope.com/courses/1287917/assignments/7902673) The responses to this “quiz” will not be available to your classmates. The quiz is not timed.

- [ ] [Introduce Yourself to Your Classmates](https://edstem.org/us/courses/97328/discussion/7863463) This is a friendly class and this will be your first step in making friends in this class.


- [ ] [Get Your Tech Ready](https://www.gradescope.com/courses/1287917/assignments/7903266) The responses to this “quiz” will help us make sure that you are ready for the first class in terms of your technological needs. The quiz is not timed. 

- [ ] [Syllabus Quiz](https://www.gradescope.com/courses/1287917/assignments/7903349) Read this course website in detail before attempting this quiz. Especially read the policies section. The quiz is not timed.
